Components
All ComponentsApp ShellSidebar & TreeToolbarCanvas & PreviewAddon PanelControlsDocs PanelStatus BarStory Card

Controls

Args editor grid for the Controls addon pane. Each control maps to a story argument and wraps any Bootstrap form element.

Control Grid

Use .cf-control-grid to create an auto-fill responsive grid of labeled inputs. Each .cf-control is a vertical label + input pair.

<div class="cf-control-grid">
  <!-- Text arg -->
  <label class="cf-control">
    <span class="cf-control-label">label <code>string</code></span>
    <input class="form-control form-control-sm" value="Click me">
  </label>

  <!-- Enum / select arg -->
  <label class="cf-control">
    <span class="cf-control-label">variant <code>enum</code></span>
    <select class="form-select form-select-sm">
      <option>primary</option>
      <option>secondary</option>
      <option>danger</option>
    </select>
  </label>

  <!-- Boolean arg -->
  <label class="cf-control">
    <span class="cf-control-label">disabled <code>boolean</code></span>
    <select class="form-select form-select-sm">
      <option>false</option>
      <option>true</option>
    </select>
  </label>
</div>

Control Input Types

Any Bootstrap form control works inside .cf-control. Common patterns:

Reset Button Pattern

Use .cf-control-label's flex layout to place a reset button on the right of the label row.

<label class="cf-control">
  <span class="cf-control-label">
    label <code>string</code>
    <button class="btn btn-link p-0 cf-muted" style="font-size:.72rem" type="button">
      Reset
    </button>
  </span>
  <input class="form-control form-control-sm" value="…">
</label>

Classes

ClassDescription
.cf-control-gridCSS grid that auto-fills columns at 14rem min-width.
.cf-controlSingle arg row — vertical flex with .35rem gap between label and input.
.cf-control-labelLabel row with space-between layout — name left, type/reset right. Uppercase, letter-spaced.
Docs ready Components FantasyUI
